([Thai](/wiki/Thai_language "Thai language"): เมืองงาย) is a *[tambon](/wiki/Tambon "Tambon")* (subdistrict) of [Chiang Dao District](/wiki/Chiang_Dao_District "Chiang Dao District"), in [Chiang Mai Province](/wiki/Chiang_Mai_Province "Chiang Mai Province"), [Thailand](/wiki/Thailand "Thailand"). In 2020 it had a total population of 6,178 people.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

**Mueang Ngai** ([Thai](/wiki/Thai_language "Thai language"): เมืองงาย) is a *[tambon](/wiki/Tambon "Tambon")* (subdistrict) of [Chiang Dao District](/wiki/Chiang_Dao_District "Chiang Dao District"), in [Chiang Mai Province](/wiki/Chiang_Mai_Province "Chiang Mai Province"), [Thailand](/wiki/Thailand "Thailand"). In 2020 it had a total population of 6,178 people.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Administration

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mueang_Ngai&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Administration")]

### Central administration

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mueang_Ngai&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Central administration")]

The *tambon* is subdivided into 11 administrative villages (*[muban](/wiki/Muban "Muban")*).

| No. | Name | Thai |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 01. | Ban Mueang Ngai Nuea | บ้านเมืองงายเหนือ |
| 02. | Ban Mueang Ngai Tai | บ้านเมืองงายใต้ |
| 03. | Ban Mai | บ้านใหม่ |
| 04. | Ban Mae Khon | บ้านแม่ข้อน |
| 05. | Ban Sap Ngai | บ้านสบงาย |
| 06. | Ban Nong Khatae | บ้านหนองขะแตะ |
| 07. | Ban Khun Khae | บ้านขุนแขะ |
| 08. | Ban Sahakon | บ้านสหกรณ์ |
| 09. | Ban Muang Ngom | บ้านม่วงง้ม |
| 10. | Ban San | บ้านสัน |
| 11. | Ban Nong Bua | บ้านหนองบัว |

### Local administration

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mueang_Ngai&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Local administration")]

The area of the subdistrict is shared by 2 local governments.

* the subdistrict municipality (*[Thesaban Tambon](/wiki/Thesaban#Subdistrict_municipality "Thesaban")*) Mueang Ngai (เทศบาลตำบลเมืองงาย)
* the subdistrict municipality (*[Thesaban Tambon](/wiki/Thesaban#Subdistrict_municipality "Thesaban")*) Phra That Pu Kam (เทศบาลตำบลพระธาตุปู่ก่ำ)
